header.title: Slider
header.subtitle: An input for selecting a numeric value within a range. Wraps the native range input with custom styling.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: Slider wraps a native input[type=range] with a label/value header and custom CSS track and thumb styling.

parts.input: Native range input. Carries all browser accessibility and keyboard semantics.
parts.track: The horizontal bar representing the full range.
parts.thumb: The draggable handle the user moves to select a value.
parts.label: Optional text label shown above the slider.
parts.value: Optional numeric readout shown aligned to the right of the label.

states.title: States
states.description: Default, with value display, and disabled.

range.title: Range and step
range.description: Control min, max, and step to define the slider's granularity.

props.label: Text label rendered above the slider.
props.showValue: When true, the current value is displayed to the right of the label.
props.formatValue: Function to format the numeric value for display (e.g. append a unit).
props.extendsNote: Slider extends Omit<HTMLInputAttributes, 'type' | 'size'>. All native range attributes are supported.
